name: NewHold Investment Corp. III
business: NewHold Investment Corp III is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company concentrates on sourcing business combination opportunities with industrial technology businesses, with particular emphasis on themes commonly referred to as Industry 4.0.

exposures.sentence: We will concentrate on sourcing business combination opportunities with industrial technology businesses, with particular emphasis on those that align with several key themes commonly referred to as Industry 4.0, including but not limited to: Transportation and logistics, Distribution and supply chain, Value added manufacturing and robotics, Grid resiliency, Environmental services, Business services, and Advanced sensor technologies and associated applications.
